analysis: High image_similarity (0.86) and low reconstruction entropy (0.156) indicate that X preserves the structural manifold defined by Y — modes are intact and there is no structural degradation. Learning is active (learning_signal 0.328, learning_active = true, stagnation = false) while the system is heating slightly (temp = 0.923, temp_slope > 0). Mixing shows mixed signals: r_hat ~1.008 (near ideal) but tau_int ~6.9 (slow autocorrelation). Quality metrics (low mean L2, high effective rank) support good reconstruction and representational capacity. Given the strong structural similarity, the STRICT CONSTRAINT forbids labeling this as mode collapse despite somewhat slow mixing and low entropy. Overall: the system is actively learning and producing ordered, structurally faithful outputs. Confidence is bounded by the strong image_similarity evidence but tempered by limited temporal-history detail and the slow mixing signal. [OVERRIDDEN: high structural similarity]
